When degree are considered, Mercury in 8 Deg, Mars in 13
Deg, Jupiter in 21 Deg, and sun in 27 Deg, all in Scorpio,
dragon Tail in 8 Deg, at Pisces-and Pisces and Scorpio, both are
in North sign.
Mercury and Dragon Tail are in same degrees, who are/inimical
to each other. Next there is Mars inimical to Mercury. As stated
in the previous chart, same combinations appear in this chart
also. Hence the native undergoes love marriage (because of
Mercury and Dragon Tail conjunction) aspected by Moon from

84 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
the 7th, thus indicating that the native after love marriage, gets
relinquished from her. Venus is the real wife that he gets in the
second, marriage.
